steps.title: Find what statistical analysis eliminates
steps.content: The strongest clue is the pairing of “detailed statistical analysis” with “precluded claims” and “99% confidence.” Statistical analysis serves to eliminate uncertainty and establish definitive conclusions about what data represents.

steps.title: Connect to the correct choice
steps.content:
Statistical analysis precluded claims of ambiguity: achieving 99% confidence proves the signal is unambiguously a gravitational wave, ruling out any claim it could be interpreted as something else.

The other three choices either address unrelated features (inconspicuousness describes detectability; discretion has no relevance), or reverse the logic (probability is established by analysis, not precluded).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
